title: POEA Rules and Regulations Governing the Recruitment and Employment of Seafarers
content: This document contains the rules and regulations issued by the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) in 2003, governing the recruitment and employment of Filipino seafarers for overseas employment. It outlines the standards, procedures, and requirements for recruitment agencies, seafarers, and employers to ensure the protection of Filipino seafarers' rights and welfare while working abroad.

metadata.source_file: 2003 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of Seafarers.pdf
